title: Compression Report (the Plan)
description: One static, human-reviewable summary per model per run: what the base model was, what compression produced the winning variant, and the size / latency / accuracy deltas of that variant vs the native baseline. This is the artifact Front Door B shows a human before they consent to deploy, and the artifact Front Door A can archive without needing an MLflow instance.

target_hardware.description: Where the reported latency was measured, e.g. cpu-generic, nvidia-a10g, apple-m3, sony-imx500. Compression metrics are meaningless without this.

hash.description: sha256 of the native model artifact for provenance / rollback identity

mlflow_run_id.description: null when the run had no MLflow instance (Front Door A headless case)

deltas.description: Best variant vs native baseline. Sign convention: size/latency negative = smaller/faster (good); accuracy_delta negative = worse.

variants.description: Every benchmarked variant (native + compressed) so a reviewer can see the full trade-off table, not just the winner.
